---
description: "End-of-session summary. Summarizes decisions, changes, and open questions. Paste the output into CONTEXT.md to keep continuity across sessions."
agent: "ask"
---

This session is ending. Summarize everything we did in the following format — be precise and concise, no fluff:

## What we decided
List the architectural, algorithmic, or design decisions made this session. For each one, note **why** — the reasoning, not just the outcome. Future-me needs to know why, not just what.

## What we changed or implemented
List the concrete changes to code, structure, or approach. Be specific enough that I can find what was touched.

## What we discovered
Any bugs found, assumptions invalidated, unexpected behavior, performance findings, or new understanding of the problem.

## What the current state of the code is
One paragraph: what works, what is stubbed, what is broken, what is untested.

## Open questions and next steps
What is unresolved? What should I do next session? What is the riskiest unknown remaining?

## What I should re-read or re-derive before next session
If there is anything I accepted without fully understanding, flag it here so I can study it before continuing.

---
Format this for pasting directly into a CONTEXT.md file.
